positive: A mystical forest creature, stylized like an elegant woodland spirit or fae, rendered in a clean, silhouette-heavy aesthetic. The creature should be depicted gracefully amidst stylized foliage, illuminated by soft, ethereal bioluminescent glowing mushrooms and delicate moonlight. Focus on strong, crisp outlines and high contrast. Color palette: deep sapphire blues, forest emerald greens, and pops of iridescent gold for the glow. Composition: Central, symmetrical placement of the creature, optimized for apparel printing. Style: Art Deco meets magical realism, highly vectorized, flat graphic elements combined with detailed organic textures. Print-friendly, high resolution, centered, perfect for a T-shirt graphic.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, messy, photographic, hyperdetailed skin, logo, trademark, cartoon, sketch, dirty, messy composition
